module_info.docstring: Deduplication checker — compares entries against AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md content.

classes.name: DedupResult
classes.docstring: Deduplication result for a single entry.

classes.name: _TargetSection
classes.docstring: A section from a target document with its aggregated keywords.

functions.name: _strip_intermem_marker
functions.docstring: Remove inline intermem promotion marker comments.

functions.name: _normalize
functions.docstring: Normalize text for comparison: lowercase, strip markdown bullets and whitespace.

functions.name: _extract_keywords
functions.docstring: Extract meaningful keywords (3+ char words) from text, lowercased.

functions.name: _extract_lines
functions.docstring:
Extract content lines from a markdown file.

Returns tuples of (display_line, normalized_source_line, filename).

functions.name: _extract_sections
functions.docstring: Extract sections from a target document for keyword-level comparison.

functions.name: check_duplicates
functions.docstring:
Check each entry against all target docs for duplicates.

Three-layer matching:
1. Exact hash match on normalized first line -> exact_duplicate
2. Fuzzy line match >= 75% -> fuzzy_duplicate
3. Keyword overlap: if >= 60% of entry keywords appear in a target section -> fuzzy_duplicate
